title: Christopher Cerasi
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Citation}}
'''Christopher Cerasi''' was an editor for [[LucasBooks]]. He edited issues 1–80 of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' as well as the entire line of ''[[Star Wars]]'' comics for [[Dark Horse Comics]], among other titles. He left the employ of [[Lucas Licensing]] to return to his home state of [[Wikipedia:New York|New York]]. In [[2003]], Cerasi began work as an editor in the Licensed Publishing Division of DC Comics and remained there until October 2010.

Cerasi is an unabashed [[Carrie Fisher]] fan, and was even featured in the introductory [[Real Life Tales Of Dave Land]] story for an edition of ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' (wearing Leia's gold metal slave outfit) which featured stories uniquely focusing on [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

He is also the author of the ''[[Star Wars Fandex Deluxe Edition]]'', and wrote the [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (comic series)comic adaptation of Episode III]] under the pseudonym Miles Lane, as well as the ''Star Wars Tales'' story "[[First Impressions (comic story)|First Impressions]]" (as Nathan Walker) about Princess Leia's first visit to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]/meeting with [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
